label: Accessibility
items: Keyboard focus traps added to 8 more modals — Add Item, Add to List, Automation, Connect Device, Device Detail / Settings, New Plan, and Choose Plant Icons. Tab stays inside the dialog while it's open.

label: Photos
items: Photo uploads are now compressed in the browser before they hit storage — uploads are faster on flaky connections and your photos take up less space.
Pinned a plant photo as the cover? It now appears as a banner at the top of that plant's edit screen.

label: Reliability
items: The offline queue now knows how to replay more than just task completions — task postpones, journal entries, and ailment links can also be queued. (Wiring those call sites into the queue is in progress.)

items.text: New 'My Beta Feedback' section in Account Settings shows every piece of feedback you've sent and its status — Awaiting review / Acknowledged / Resolved — plus any reply from the Rhozly team.
New 'Microclimate' chip on the Daily Brief takes you straight to your garden layouts to see the sun / wind / frost outlook by area.

label: Planner
items: When you and another home member are reviewing the same plan, you'll see small avatars next to the plan title showing who else is here.
